name: oddsedge-deploy
description: OddsEdge v2.2 - Multi-league betting intelligence website

sessions.summary: Applied 8 improvements: fixed Go Pro PayPal buttons to WhatsApp flow, added cold-start UX with spinner and retry logic, multi-league backend support (7 leagues), league selector dropdown in topbar, mobile status bar and team name truncation, Open Graph/Twitter/JSON-LD SEO meta tags, error state with retry button and offline banner, plus KPI shimmer hover and background texture polish.
